mapper.insert: INSERT INTO resend_message ( wms_taskid, wcs_taskid, tes_taskid, podid, tkdat, statu, is_successfully ) VALUES ( #{wmsTaskid}, #{wcsTaskid}, #{tesTaskid}, #{podid}, #{tkdat}, #{statu}, #{isSuccessfully} )
mapper.update: UPDATE resend_message SET wms_taskid = #{wmsTaskid}, wcs_taskid = #{wcsTaskid}, tes_taskid = #{tesTaskid}, podid = #{podid}, tkdat = #{tkdat}, statu = #{statu}, is_successfully = #{isSuccessfully} WHERE id = #{id}
